description: Account for sales of flax. A calligraphic copy on parchment, ca. 1025. The account was sent from Ifrīqiya to Egypt and provides exact details about 120 bales of flax. Accounts in the same hand and possibly from the same book are also found in CUL Or.1080 J291, BL OR 5554A.53-54r, Moss. VIII,476.1-2. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, p. 383 and Goitein index cards linked below.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
